# coolify_hetzner_ssh_keys (Data Source)

Lists all available Hetzner SSH keys for a given cloud provider token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_hetzner_ssh_keys" "all" {
  cloud_provider_token_uuid = coolify_cloud_token.hetzner.uuid
}

output "hetzner_ssh_key_names" {
  value = [for k in data.coolify_hetzner_ssh_keys.all.ssh_keys : k.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_provider_token_uuid` (String) The UUID of the cloud provider token to use for listing Hetzner SSH keys.

### Optional

- `filter` (Block Set) Filter results by field values. Multiple filters are ANDed together. Multiple values within a filter are ORed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))

### Read-Only

- `ssh_keys` (Attributes List) The list of Hetzner SSH keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssh_keys))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The field name to filter by.
- `values` (Set of String) The values to match against. Multiple values are ORed.


<a id="nestedatt--ssh_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ssh_keys`

Read-Only:

- `fingerprint` (String) The fingerprint of the SSH key.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the SSH key.
- `name` (String) The name of the SSH key.
